# This week on agent-office (Apr 13–18)

**Foundation & engine (Apr 13–14)** — Shipped Phase 1–4 in rapid succession: foundation (`bd59458`), agent core with personas/skills/launcher (`6a1ede2`), memory engine with domain-scoped queries (`ca066d7`), and React office UI with pixel-art sprites (`eaebe7c`, `69510ec`). Extracted the pixel-agents engine into typed modules (`54fcd13`, `769983d`, `9df83eb`, `fd62f21`) and wired a 25×20 office with 7 themed zones and an `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper (`a4ef81e`, `c8c8f57`, `6ac04c0`).

**claude-mem integration & launch preview (Apr 14)** — Read-only SQLite adapter for claude-mem (`d109f26`), persona-to-observation heuristic filter (`e079b4f`), iTerm2 launch spawn (`64ed75e`), and the original `LaunchPreview` flow (`27cb1d3`, `c0f0d86`, `a0549e3`, `acdddfa`). Launcher fixes for terminal detection and execFile (`af527f8`).

**Telemetry dashboard, provider-neutral ingestion (Apr 15–16)** — Phase 5 telemetry dashboard merged (`3199451`), provider adapters + portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), provider-aware launch preview (`42aab52`), local skill roots (`a4cb528`), `doctor` command (`3b9f1a9`), provider-neutral project history ingestion (`9c4afb4`), and live-session presence fixes (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`).

**Unified memory + persona brief (Apr 18)** — Persona-scoped memory brief generator (`4d9a58a`), wired into live session launch (`17bf243`) and rendered in LaunchPreview (`ec56fb9`). Unified memory stats + semantic search, dropped claude-mem fallback (`2dbef00`, `3c1cf94`). Simplified office to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon floors + Fixer persona (`d5da889`). Consolidated four separate preview/picker modals into one `LaunchWizard` (`3b6c0b4`), deleting `ProjectPicker.jsx` and `LaunchPreview.jsx` and removing dead store slices.

**Benchmarks & marketing (Apr 18)** — Brief-vs-raw-memory token savings harness (`40c5014`); Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (`01f2a70`); README rewrite around unified-memory USP (`18e1cbb`).

**Uncertain / not verified:**
- `bench/` and `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` are **untracked** per session-start `git status` — the whitepaper experiment runner (memory refs 3729, 3726) appears unshipped/uncommitted as of this snapshot.
- Memory refs mention a backend restart issue (S286, 3657) and port 3334 config — I did not verify this is still in play.
- I did not inspect diffs, so I can't vouch for the scope of individual commits beyond their subject lines.
